backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Trip, Location, etc.) and backend logic for a ride-hailing app, including role-based access control, user profile management, and trip operations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three high-confidence features for RideRequestForm.tsx: fixing pickup manual field visibility (REQ-1), drop field visibility with roundtrip checkbox (REQ-2), and GPS failure fallback to manual mode (REQ-3).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key behavioral details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Namma Driver Pilot' that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup with role-based route guards for customer, driver, admin, and admin-upgrade routes, plus a root layout that conditionally shows the ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminTripsTab.ts: Searchable admin trips table component that displays all trips with customer/driver emails, formatted pickup/dropoff locations, timestamps, and color-coded status badges.
frontend/src/components/AdminUsersTab.ts: Displays a searchable, scrollable table of all users with their email, full name, role (color-coded badge), and join date. Fetches data via the `useGetAllUsers` hook.
frontend/src/components/AvailableTripsSe: Shows a scrollable list of requested trips available for drivers to accept, displaying pickup/dropoff locations and creation time. Handles trip acceptance via the `useAcceptTrip` mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTripList: Renders a scrollable list of the current customer's trips with pickup/dropoff locations, status badges, and timestamps. Fetches trip data using the `useGetMyTrips` hook.
frontend/src/components/DriverProfileSec: Displays a driver's profile card including service area, vehicle experience, languages, earnings, and duty status, with duty status locked to On-Duty when an active trip exists. Provides an Edit Profile button and handles loading/error states with skeletons.
frontend/src/components/DriverTripList.t: Shows a driver's trips segmented into current (accepted) and completed/cancelled sections, with a 'Mark as Completed' button for the active trip. Uses `useGetMyTrips` and `useCompleteTrip` hooks with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/EditDriverProfil: Form for editing a driver's profile including service pincode, area name, vehicle experience checkboxes, transmission comfort, languages, and availability toggle. Availability is locked to true when the driver has an accepted trip.
Dialog wrapper that renders `EditDriverProfileForm` inside a modal for editing a driver's profile. Passes through the `hasAcceptedTrip` flag to lock duty status when appropriate.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps pages with a top navigation bar and a footer crediting caffeine.ai. Composes `Navigation` and renders children in a flex column filling the viewport.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Top navigation bar component that shows the app logo and a user dropdown menu with role-based dashboard navigation and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to enter their email and full name to create an initial profile without a role assigned yet.
Form component for customers to create trip requests, supporting local/outstation trip types, one-way/round-trip journey types, GPS or manual location input, and vehicle selection.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionWar: Modal that prompts authenticated users to permanently select their role (customer, driver, or admin via a secret code) and navigates to the appropriate dashboard after selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor using React Query, waiting until the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, role management, admin upgrade, and trip creation/retrieval operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes using earth tones and warm greens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying logged-in identity info, total user/trip stats, and tabbed views for managing users and trips.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUpgradePage.tsx: Page with a form that allows a user to enter a secret setup code to upgrade their account to the admin role.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard page showing a ride request form and a list of the customer's past and current trips side by side.
frontend/src/pages/DriverDashboard.tsx: Driver dashboard page with tabs for available trips and the driver's own trips, plus a profile section with an edit modal.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Landing page with a hero section and login button that redirects authenticated users to their role-appropriate dashboard after profile fetch.
frontend/src/pages/RoleSelectionPage.tsx: Displays a role selection page (Customer, Driver, Admin) for authenticated users without an assigned role, redirecting users with existing roles to their respective dashboards and showing a RoleSelectionWarningModal for role assignment.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers to maintain values like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom design tokens (colors via oklch variables, border radius, fonts, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for a cab booking platform, documenting architectural rules for conditional rendering of pickup/drop fields in the Customer Dashboard booking form and listing existing fix features for RideRequestForm.tsx.
